title: Logistics Bridge
description: Add-On mod for AppliedEnergistics, Refined Storage and Logistics Pipes
body:
This mod is an Add-On mod for AppliedEnergistics, Refined Storage and Logistics Pipes.

Features:  
- Bridge Pipe and AE Bridge:  
Creates a bridge between your Logistics Pipes network and your ME system.  
Works with items and crafting.  

- Bridge Pipe and RS Bridge:  
Creates a bridge between your Logistics Pipes network and your RS system.  
Only works with items from RS to LP.

- Crafting Manager (pipe) & Result Pipe  
Used with Logistics Pipes  
Can contain 27 Crafting modules with 2 Upgrade slots  
Used with a Result Pipe & Satellite Pipe.  
Result Pipe provides the crafting result to the Logistics Pipes network.  

- Crafting Manager (block) & Satellite Bus & Packages  
Can contain 27 patterns.  
Sends items to the connected Satellite Bus.  
Patterns can contain Packages to define a different Satellite Bus.  

My mod spotlight video:  
<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Q3dIjFGc23U"></iframe>
